title: Totem of Wemmbu
description: This project turns the totem of undying into a little Wemmbu
body:
# Totem of Wemmbu This pack is very simple! All it does is modify the existing Totem of Undying into a little Wemmbu (Or a Totem of Wemmbu).
That's really all the pack does, besides change the name of the Totem of Undying to "Totem of Wemmbu"
